name: niucodes-image-gen
description: Standalone OpenAI Images SDK wrapper for generation and editing.

scripts.build:bin:macos-arm64: npm run bundle:bin:mac && pkg --compress GZip --targets node22-macos-arm64 --output bin/niucodes-image-gen-macos-arm64 build/niucodes-image-gen-mac.cjs
scripts.build:bin:macos-x64: npm run bundle:bin:mac && pkg --compress GZip --targets node22-macos-x64 --output bin/niucodes-image-gen-macos-x64 build/niucodes-image-gen-mac.cjs
scripts.build:bin:win-x64: npm run bundle:bin:win && pkg --compress None --public --no-bytecode --targets node18-win-x64 --output bin/niucodes-image-gen-win-x64.exe build/niucodes-image-gen-win.cjs
scripts.build:package:macos-arm64: npm run build:bin:macos-arm64 && node scripts/create-release.mjs --platform macos-arm64
scripts.build:package:macos-x64: npm run build:bin:macos-x64 && node scripts/create-release.mjs --platform macos-x64
scripts.build:package:win-x64: npm run build:bin:win-x64 && node scripts/create-release.mjs --platform win-x64
scripts.build:release: npm run build:bin:macos-arm64 && npm run build:bin:macos-x64 && npm run build:bin:win-x64 && node scripts/create-release.mjs
